MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Normandy partnership is present. Represented by James Bello.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Demetrios Zachariadis is present.
Attorney Landin F. Boring representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnik, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 10, 2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
